title: The VALIS Trilogy — Page 324
raw_text:
Standing on the sidewalk—a man. A familiar man, a black. Middle-aged,
well dressed.
“Elias!” Herb called. “What are you doing? What is it?”
“I came back to see if you were all right.” Elias Tate walked up to Herb’s
car. “You’re totally pale.”
“Get in the car,” Herb said.
Elias got in.
